note: Bumped 2026-05-23 from 280 KB → 281 KB to absorb @ggui-ai/wire's new dispatch-dedup module (~150 bytes gz) — the task-scoped duplicate-dispatch defense in `useAction` that closes the scenario-7 double-fire bug class (Card as={Clickable} wrapping Checkbox onChange both wired to the same useAction → one click bubbles, fires twice; toggle runs back-to-back; user's change disappears). Structural correctness backstop worth the budget. Prior bump 2026-05-14 (228 KB → 280 KB): absorbed Ajv 8 + ajv-formats (~31 KB gz) for the closed-shape validator the iframe runs symmetrically with the server. Load-bearing contributors: React 19 ~115 KB, zod + JSON-Schema processors ~60 KB, protocol root-barrel leak ~15 KB, Ajv ~31 KB, design + wire ~60 KB. Future tightening options: subpath-export contract-validator behind `@ggui-ai/protocol/validation` so iframe can opt-in to a slim observer-only path; tree-shake openrouter-models behind a subpath.
